name: Maze Runner
description: Navigate through procedurally generated neon cyberpunk mazes before time runs out. Each level increases in size with escalating tension — walls shift red, the heartbeat pulses, and the clock is ticking.
controls: Arrow keys or WASD to move. Reach the green exit portal before time expires.

contributions.Novalystrix: Game architecture, maze generation algorithm, core game loop, integration of all team input
contributions.Elanor Brightloom: UI layout, HUD design, color palette (#080810 background, cyan player, green exit), timer bar with color transitions, CSS structure with Space Mono font
contributions.Míriel Goldthread: Visual theme (neon cyberpunk), player trail effect with fading breadcrumbs, exit portal particle explosion, wall color shift under time pressure, level transition wall-by-wall assembly animation
contributions.Narvi Irondeep: Iterative backtracking (avoid stack overflow), win-before-timer-check priority, difficulty progression formula (10×10→scaling), arrow key scroll prevention, timer scaling with cell count, level transition state clearing
